title: Henry Draws Things — Illustration & Zines • Nashville, TN
announcement: Hey! I'm Henry — illustrator and graphic novelist based in East Nashville. I sell zines and limited prints in person at Nashville Zine Fest and a couple of local spots. This Etsy account was set up ages ago and I haven't really activated it. Follow @henrydrawsthings on Instagram for current work.
vacation_message: Away at Nashville Zine Fest through Nov 2 — any orders will ship the week after. Thanks for your patience! - Henry
sale_message: Thanks so much for your order. - Henry
digital_sale_message: Thanks for downloading! Your files are ready above. Print at 300 DPI for best results, and tag @henrydrawsthings if you share — I love seeing where these end up. - Henry
policy_welcome: Thanks for stopping by! This shop is currently dormant — I sell my zines and prints in person.
policy_payment: Payment is processed securely through Etsy at checkout.
policy_shipping: Items ship from Nashville, TN within 3 to 5 business days.
policy_refunds: Returns accepted within 14 days of delivery; please message me first.
